headline: Products I love &
subtitle: Not sponsored recommendations — just what's actually in my kitchen, on my counter, or in my bag. Every link goes directly to Shopee Vietnam.
noteBody: Every product links to Shopee Vietnam. I earn a small affiliate commission when you buy — at no extra cost to you. It helps keep my content free.
why1d: I remove products from this list if I stop using them. No dead links, no outdated picks.
why2d: I earn a commission on Shopee purchases. It costs you nothing and funds free content.
why3t: Use cases, not just product names
why3d: Every card tells you exactly why I picked it and how it fits into my daily routine.
newsSub: Get simple, healthy recipes & new product picks in your inbox.
